---
title: "German Marxists in Translation"
sidebar: false
---

Complete, unabridged parallel German/English editions of works of German
Marxism. The German texts follow the [Marxists Internet
Archive](https://www.marxists.org/deutsch/) transcriptions; the English
translations are new, with terminology fixed by a common termbase and
completeness checked mechanically block by block.

## Karl Kautsky

- [**The Erfurt Programme** / *Das Erfurter Programm*](erfurter-programm/index.qmd)
  (1892) — the theoretical commentary on the SPD's Erfurt Programme.
  Parallel edition with [editorial note](erfurter-programm/editorial.qmd)
  and the [programme text itself](erfurter-programm/prologue.qmd) as prologue.
